schedule.name: daily-article
schedule.prompt:
🌅 ToolScout Daily Publisher Activated

Execute the full article publishing pipeline:
1. Read HEARTBEAT.md and LESSONS.md
2. Find a low-competition keyword using Brave Search
3. Research 3-5 authoritative sources
4. Write a 1200-1800 word article with Hugo frontmatter
5. QUALITY GATE: If not A-grade, ABORT and explain why
6. Build: hugo --minify
7. Deploy: wrangler pages deploy
8. Git: add, commit, push
9. Update: keywords.json, published.json, PIPELINE.md
10. Log: daily-logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md
11. Notify Michael on Telegram with: title + live URL

Quality is NON-NEGOTIABLE. Better to skip a day than publish garbage.
